items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布声明：因美国政府出口管制指令，Claude Fable 5 与 Claude Mythos 5 的访问被全面暂停。这是合规/可用性层面的硬性变更：已集成 Fable 5/Mythos 5 的服务会立即断流。需立即将 model 字段切回仍可用的 Claude Opus 4.8 / Sonnet / Hauser 系列。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：把所有调用 claude-fable-5-* 与 claude-mythos-5-* 的 SDK/API 切回 claude-opus-4-8 或同档可用模型；同时清理 prompts 与 context cache 中对该版本的依赖。关注后续 export control 解除时间线。

items.original_summary: nefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Product  Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger perform...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 国家级 fellowship 项目，招募早期职业者将 AI 推广到美国各社区，并同期发布《AI Exponential》政策建议。属于人才/政策类公告，与 API/SDK/模型能力完全无关。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。纯人才与政策项目，工程团队无任何可执行改动。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements   Product  Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of m...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 将 Project Glasswing 扩展到约 150 个新组织、覆盖 15+ 国家，属企业试点/公益类项目，不涉及模型版本、API 字段或 SDK 变化。已有集成 Anthropic 服务的应用不受影响。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。无 API 改动、无限速/区域/计费变化，开发者侧零行动。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，Opus 系列升级版，在 coding、agentic task 与专业工作流上更强。相对 Opus 4.x，4.8 为同档位迭代升级，API 字段、Tool Use、context window 用法保持一致；建议通过 model=claude-opus-4-8 显式指定。
items.backend_focus: 建议在 staging 把 anthropic SDK 调用切到 model=claude-opus-4-8 跑 A/B 对比；max_tokens、tool_choice、prompt caching 用法不变。注意 4.7 仍可用，关注 6 个月内 4.7 进入 deprecation 的时间线。

items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 联合创始人 Chris Olah 就教皇 Leo XIV 通谕《Magnifica humanitas》发表讲话稿。属品牌/伦理公关内容，与工程接口、模型能力、定价均无关。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。纯品牌内容，工程团队无任何可执行事项。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 在首尔开设办公室并宣布与韩国 AI 生态的多项新合作。属区域市场与商务合作公告，短期无 API 区域可用性或 SDK 变化。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。关注韩国区企业客户后续是否会带来 region 端点变化，但开发者侧目前无任何迁移事项。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首期《Anthropic Public Record》结果，公开内部运营与政策数据。属透明度报告，无 API/SDK/模型版本变更。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。运营与政策公开信息，对集成方无任何接口或计费影响。

items.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 TCS 达成合作，将 Claude 引入受监管行业（金融、医疗等）。属商务合作公告，不涉及 API 字段、限速、定价或区域变化。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。商务合作不影响现有 API 集成，若后续推出 regulated-industry 专属 SKU 再跟进。

items.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 DXC 达成联盟，DXC 将把 Claude 集成进银行、航司及受监管行业的核心系统。属渠道合作，无 API/SDK/计费变化。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。集成方无任何改动，关注后续是否上线受监管行业专属端点或合规认证。

items.title: Introducing Claude Corps
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Corps 项目，面向早期职业者的 fellowship 计划。属人才/教育项目，与模型、API、SDK 无关。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。纯人才招募公告，无任何工程相关变化。
